images.caption: Figure 1:(Left) CoT vs Non-CoT performance of open-source MRMs. (Right) Bar chart showing the average accuracy of various families of MLMs over 13 benchmark datasets. For each model, the left bar shows the accuracy achieved by CoT prompting, and the right bar shows for base prompt (non-CoT). We observe CoT prompting drops performance over a wide range of backbones and model scales, including Qwen3-VL-8B-ThinkingBaiet al.(2025a), a model with explicitly enhanced spatial perception.
